title: [ExportVerilog] [SV] Open array raw data is not accessible from verilator

features.name: dpi open array with unpacked array argument
features.description: Code should include a DPI import function with open array input parameter passed an unpacked array argument

features.name: verilator dpi c-layout with wire vs int unpacked arrays
features.description: Code should include two unpacked arrays of same dimensions where one uses wire [31:0] and other uses int, both assigned via queue-style initialization and passed to DPI function to demonstrate Verilator treats wire-packed unpacked array differently from int unpacked array for C-memory layout
